prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of UPS stock, which typically exhibits annualized volatility around 25-30%. For an 18-day forecast, I used a random walk model with drift near zero, applying standard statistical confidence intervals. The point estimate assumes no systematic drift over the short 18-day period. Confidence intervals are calculated using normal distribution assumptions with estimated daily volatility of approximately 1.6%, scaled for the 18-day timeframe.
